facebook.guidelines: Conversational tone. Lead with a hook (question or bold claim). 1-3 short paragraphs. End with a clear CTA. Emojis sparingly. Hashtags optional (2-3 max).

instagram.guidelines: Visual-first platform. Caption supports the image/video. Lead with a hook. Line breaks for readability. CTA directs to link in bio. 5-15 relevant hashtags at end.

linkedin.guidelines: Professional tone. Open with a surprising insight or counter-intuitive claim. Use line breaks generously (mobile-first). End with a question to drive comments. No hashtags in body; 3-5 at end. Avoid hard-sell CTAs.

twitter.guidelines: 280 characters max. Punchy, direct. One clear idea per post. Thread-friendly: first post must stand alone. Links shorten to 23 chars. 1-2 hashtags max.

email.guidelines: Subject line: 6-10 words, curiosity or benefit-driven. Preview text: extends subject, not repeats it. Body: scannable with subheadings. Single primary CTA button. P.S. line for secondary offer. Mobile-first formatting.

blog.guidelines: SEO-aware title (60 chars max). Meta description (155 chars). Introduction hooks in first 2 sentences. Use H2/H3 subheadings every 200-300 words. Include internal links. Conclude with a clear next step. Aim for 1000-1500 words for SEO value.
